# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: Membership User Files Upload
Description: Allows users to upload profile pictures and documents to wp-content/uploads/user-files/.
Version: 1.0.0
Author: OpenAI
*/

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class Membership_User_Files_Upload {
    private $upload_dir_url = '';
    private $upload_dir_path = '';
    private $allowed_mimes = array(
        'jpg|jpeg|jpe' => 'image/jpeg',
        'png'          => 'image/png',
        'gif'          => 'image/gif',
        'pdf'          => 'application/pdf',
        'doc'          => 'application/msword',
        'docx'         => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document',
        'txt'          => 'text/plain',
    );

    public function __construct() {
        add_action('init', array($this, 'setup_upload_dir'));
        add_shortcode('user_file_upload_form', array($this, 'render_upload_form'));
        add_action('template_redirect', array($this, 'handle_upload'));
    }

    public function setup_upload_dir() {
        $uploads = wp_upload_dir();
        $this->upload_dir_path = trailingslashit($uploads['basedir']) . 'user-files/';
        $this->upload_dir_url  = trailingslashit($uploads['baseurl']) . 'user-files/';

        if (!file_exists($this->upload_dir_path)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($this->upload_dir_path);
        }

        $index_file = $this->upload_dir_path . 'index.php';
        if (!file_exists($index_file)) {
            @file_put_contents($index_file, "<?php\n// Silence is golden.\n");
        }

        $htaccess_file = $this->upload_dir_path . '.htaccess';
        if (!file_exists($htaccess_file)) {
            @file_put_contents($htaccess_file, "Options -Indexes\n");
        }
    }

    public function render_upload_form() {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return '<p>You must be logged in to upload files.</p>';
        }

        $message = '';
        if (isset($_GET['ufu_status'])) {
            if ($_GET['ufu_status'] === 'success') {
                $message = '<p style="color:green;">File uploaded successfully.</p>';
            } elseif ($_GET['ufu_status'] === 'error' && isset($_GET['ufu_message'])) {
                $message = '<p style="color:red;">' . esc_html(wp_unslash($_GET['ufu_message'])) . '</p>';
            }
        }

        ob_start();
        echo $message;
        ?>
        <form method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data">
            <?php wp_nonce_field('ufu_upload_action', 'ufu_upload_nonce'); ?>
            <p>
                <label for="ufu_file_type">File Type</label><br>
                <select name="ufu_file_type" id="ufu_file_type" required>
                    <option value="profile_picture">Profile Picture</option>
                    <option value="document">Document</option>
                </select>
            </p>
            <p>
                <label for="ufu_user_file">Choose File</label><br>
                <input type="file" name="ufu_user_file" id="ufu_user_file" required>
            </p>
            <p>
                <input type="hidden" name="ufu_upload_submit" value="1">
                <button type="submit">Upload</button>
            </p>
        </form>
        <?php
        $files = get_user_meta(get_current_user_id(), '_ufu_uploaded_files', true);
        if (!empty($files) && is_array($files)) {
            echo '<h3>Your Uploaded Files</h3><ul>';
            foreach ($files as $file) {
                $label = !empty($file['label']) ? $file['label'] : 'File';
                $name  = !empty($file['original_name']) ? $file['original_name'] : basename($file['file']);
                $url   = !empty($file['url']) ? $file['url'] : '';
                echo '<li>' . esc_html($label) . ': ';
                if ($url) {
                    echo '<a href="' . esc_url($url) . '" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">' . esc_html($name) . '</a>';
                } else {
                    echo esc_html($name);
                }
                echo '</li>';
            }
            echo '</ul>';
        }

        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    public function handle_upload() {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return;
        }

        if (!isset($_POST['ufu_upload_submit'])) {
            return;
        }

        if (!isset($_POST['ufu_upload_nonce']) || !wp_verify_nonce(sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['ufu_upload_nonce'])), 'ufu_upload_action')) {
            $this->redirect_with_error('Security check failed.');
        }

        if (!isset($_FILES['ufu_user_file']) || empty($_FILES['ufu_user_file']['name'])) {
            $this->redirect_with_error('No file was selected.');
        }

        if (!function_exists('wp_check_filetype_and_ext')) {
            require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/file.php';
        }

        $file_type_label = isset($_POST['ufu_file_type']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['ufu_file_type'])) : 'document';
        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $file = $_FILES['ufu_user_file'];

        if (!empty($file['error']) && $file['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            $this->redirect_with_error('Upload error code: ' . (int) $file['error']);
        }

        $original_name = sanitize_file_name($file['name']);
        $checked = wp_check_filetype_and_ext($file['tmp_name'], $original_name, $this->allowed_mimes);

        if (empty($checked['ext']) || empty($checked['type'])) {
            $this->redirect_with_error('File type is not allowed.');
        }

        $max_size = 10 * 1024 * 1024;
        if ((int) $file['size'] > $max_size) {
            $this->redirect_with_error('File exceeds the 10MB size limit.');
        }

        $user_folder = $this->upload_dir_path . 'user-' . $user_id . '/';
        $user_folder_url = $this->upload_dir_url . 'user-' . $user_id . '/';

        if (!file_exists($user_folder)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($user_folder);
        }

        $sub_index = $user_folder . 'index.php';
        if (!file_exists($sub_index)) {
            @file_put_contents($sub_index, "<?php\n// Silence is golden.\n");
        }

        $extension = !empty($checked['ext']) ? $checked['ext'] : pathinfo($original_name, PATHINFO_EXTENSION);
        $base_name = pathinfo($original_name, PATHINFO_FILENAME);
        $base_name = sanitize_file_name($base_name);
        $final_name = $base_name . '-' . time() . '.' . $extension;
        $destination = $user_folder . $final_name;

        if (!is_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'])) {
            $this->redirect_with_error('Invalid upload source.');
        }

        if (!move_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'], $destination)) {
            $this->redirect_with_error('Failed to move uploaded file.');
        }

        @chmod($destination, 0644);

        $stored_files = get_user_meta($user_id, '_ufu_uploaded_files', true);
        if (!is_array($stored_files)) {
            $stored_files = array();
        }

        $stored_files[] = array(
            'label'         => ($file_type_label === 'profile_picture' ? 'Profile Picture' : 'Document'),
            'type'          => $file_type_label,
            'original_name' => $original_name,
            'file'          => $destination,
            'url'           => $user_folder_url . $final_name,
            'mime'          => $checked['type'],
            'uploaded_at'   => current_time('mysql'),
        );

        update_user_meta($user_id, '_ufu_uploaded_files', $stored_files);

        if ($file_type_label === 'profile_picture') {
            update_user_meta($user_id, '_ufu_profile_picture', $user_folder_url . $final_name);
        }

        wp_safe_redirect(add_query_arg('ufu_status', 'success', $this->get_redirect_url()));
        exit;
    }

    private function redirect_with_error($message) {
        $url = add_query_arg(
            array(
                'ufu_status'  => 'error',
                'ufu_message' => rawurlencode($message),
            ),
            $this->get_redirect_url()
        );
        wp_safe_redirect($url);
        exit;
    }

    private function get_redirect_url() {
        $referer = wp_get_referer();
        if ($referer) {
            return $referer;
        }
        return home_url('/');
    }
}

new Membership_User_Files_Upload();
